prompt: Customer asks: I entered the wrong email when signing up and can’t receive password resets.
completion: Please share the incorrect email you used, the email you want to use instead, your workspace name, and the last four digits of the card on file if you have one. Our team will verify ownership and update the login email so you can reset your password.

prompt: Customer asks: Can you extend my trial by 3 more days?
completion: We offer one 7-day trial extension for evaluation. If you have not used an extension yet, reply with your workspace name and team size and we will apply the full 7-day extension, which includes the extra 3 days you need.

prompt: Customer asks: My trial ended and I can’t create new tickets.
completion: When the trial ends, workspaces switch to read-only mode. You can still view tickets, but you cannot create new ones. To restore full access, go to Settings → Billing and select a paid plan.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I get a refund on my annual plan after 20 days?
completion: Our standard refund window for annual plans is 14 days from the first payment. After 14 days, refunds are generally not available, but you can still cancel to avoid future renewals.

prompt: Customer asks: I cancelled my subscription but was charged again.
completion: If you were charged after cancelling, please share your workspace name, billing email, and the invoice number if available. Our billing team will review the cancellation date and any recent charges and will correct any mistakes.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I invite more than 5 teammates during the trial?
completion: The default trial limit is 5 teammates. If you have a larger evaluation team, contact support with your workspace name and expected seat count. We may be able to temporarily raise the limit for your trial.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I change a teammate from Admin to Agent?
completion: Go to Settings → Team, select the teammate, and change their role from Admin to Agent. Save your changes to update their permissions immediately.

prompt: Customer asks: I need a copy of last year’s invoices for my finance team.
completion: You can download historical invoices from Settings → Billing → Invoices. If any older invoices are missing, contact support with your workspace name and billing email and we will resend them.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I export tickets before shutting down the workspace?
completion: Before shutting down, go to Settings → Data export and request a ticket export. We will generate a CSV that you can download. After cancellation, exports are available for 30 days while the workspace is in read-only mode.

prompt: Customer asks: Does AcornDesk support SSO for small teams?
completion: SSO is available on Business and Enterprise plans. If your small team is on one of those plans or considering an upgrade, contact support or your account manager for SSO setup details.
